name: Climb Back From the Abyss and Explore Ravenhurst, the World Ruled by the Heroes Who Betrayed You, Before Deciding Their Fate
description:
Five years ago, they stabbed you in the back and left you to die.

The Abyss caught you.

It did not save you out of kindness. It saved you because it was curious. It wanted to see what would happen. It wanted to see what you would become.

You are still at the bottom.

Layer Zero. Numerus mark: 0. No power. No allies. Just the Abyss and the climb ahead of you.

The Hollow Conclave—your betrayers—are S-rank heroes now. Beloved. Famous. Lying through their teeth every single day.

The Convocation covered it up. The world believes them.

The Abyss remembers.

And you are not here to forgive.

But first, you have to climb.

---

THE WORLD: RAVENHURST

Ravenhurst is not a kind world. The sky is often overcast, as if the world itself is holding its breath. Magic and technology coexist here—airships drift between floating fortresses, scrying orbs function like communication devices, and enchanted street lamps hum with captive wisps. But beneath the gleaming spires of Aethelburg, beneath the magitech wonders and the Convocation's golden light, something older breathes.

The Crucibles are ancient dungeons scattered across the land. They are not natural. They are sentient. Each Crucible has a will, a theme, a hunger. They test those who enter—not just with monsters and traps, but with choices. Moral trials. Emotional wounds. Sacrifices.
creator: Dia_blo
